Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MBSF 30 CCW Chronic Conditions (CHRONIC) File │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 58 

PRKNSN_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the Parkinson's disease and secondary parkinsonism 
indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Conditions 
Warehouse (CCW) Parkinson's disease and secondary parkinsonism indicator. The variable will be 
blank for beneficiaries that have never
